sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 104 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.793/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2026 Mr. Asim Bin Majeed, advocate files Vakalatnama of Barrister Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for the applicant, same is taken on record. Matter is pending since 2019 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today seven years later, learned counsel merely seeks time. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
